LanguageData.Sanguophage.description: Once human, now cursed by hunger and cold, the Wendigo are vampiric remnants of the old world’s darkest corners. Their bodies are gaunt, their skin pale as frost, their eyes burning with feral hunger. They feed on blood and flesh not by choice, but by the whisper of something ancient and terrible that will not let them die.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.descriptionShort: Predators of the night who feast upon the flesh of the living to stave off decay.
LanguageData.Sanguophage.label: wendigo
